mapper.sql:
p.PAGE_ID AS pageId, p.PAGE_NAME AS pageName, p.VIEW_MODE AS viewMode, p.APPROVE_STATE AS approveState,
CASE WHEN p.PAGE_HTML IS NOT NULL AND DBMS_LOB.GETLENGTH(p.PAGE_HTML) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS hasFile, CASE WHEN p.EXPIRED_DATE IS NOT NULL AND p.EXPIRED_DATE < SYSDATE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS isExpired, TO_CHAR(p.BEGINNING_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS beginningDate, TO_CHAR(p.EXPIRED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS expiredDate, p.REJECTED_REASON AS rejectedReason, TO_CHAR(p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS lastModifiedDtime

choose.when: ORDER BY p.PAGE_NAME ASCDESC NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.APPROVE_STATE ASCDESC NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.BEGINNING_DATE ASCDESC NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.EXPIRED_DATE ASCDESC NULLS LAST, p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME ASCDESC NULLS LAST
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY p.LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME DESC NULLS LAST

mapper.update: UPDATE SPW_CMS_PAGE SET USE_YN = 'N', LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{userId}, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND PAGE_TYPE = 'REACT' AND CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT USER_NAME FROM FWK_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{approverId} AND USER_STATE_CODE = '1'
SELECT APPROVE_STATE AS approveState, REJECTED_REASON AS rejectedReason FROM SPW_CMS_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND PAGE_TYPE = 'REACT' AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE SPW_CMS_PAGE SET APPROVE_STATE = 'PENDING', APPROVER_ID = #{approverId}, APPROVER_NAME = #{approverName}, BEGINNING_DATE = #{beginningDate}, EXPIRED_DATE = #{expiredDate}, LAST_MODIFIER_ID = #{userId}, LAST_MODIFIED_DTIME = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId} AND PAGE_TYPE = 'REACT' AND CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
